title: Cypress
description: A dark, greenish theme texture pack meant for Crystal PvP.
body:
This pack was made for the purpose Crystal PvP. The pack is themed off of a dark green color scheme with some QOL changes for PvP. There are also custom skies in use which are Optifine skies so keep that in mind when using the texture pack.

If you have any issues please contact me in the discord server or dm me 
Discord: _fusiongamer
